entries.title: System Expansion
entries.description: Successfully deployed the multi-page architectural overhaul. Each core system module (Profile, Services, Projects, Log) has been decoupled into dedicated interfaces. Integrated a centralized link registry for dynamic synchronization across the entire terminal network.

entries.title: HUD Precision Update
entries.description: Refined the HUD bracket positioning system to ensure sub-pixel alignment across varied viewport dimensions. Corrected a minor rendering latency in the CRT scanline generator.

entries.title: Initial V4 Deployment
entries.description: Commenced deployment of ECHO://TERMINAL Version 4. Transitioned to a fully modular CSS structure and a lightweight, asynchronous JavaScript core. Performance metrics indicate a 40% reduction in initial load sequence duration.

faq.question: question --availability
faq.answer: Available for freelance/contract roles and architectural consultations. Current bandwidth allows for 1-2 concurrent enterprise-scale modules.

faq.question: question --pricing
faq.answer: Project-based pricing. Every architectural deployment is unique. Contact for a detailed quote and system audit to determine resource requirements.

faq.question: question --tech-stack
faq.answer: Primarily architecting with React, Next.js, Astro, and TypeScript. Backend deployments utilize Node.js or Python, with edge delivery via decentralized nodes.

faq.question: question --process
faq.answer: The workflow follows a rigorous Research -> Design -> Build -> Deploy pipeline. This ensures maximum resonance and structural integrity for every project node.

faq.question: question --location
faq.answer: Operating from coordinates 33.51° N, 82.04° W (Martinez, GA). Full remote operational capacity with support for global time-zone synchronization.
